001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.PredicateUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
024
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.function.*;
027import java.util.stream.*;
028
029import org.apache.http.*;
030import org.apache.http.util.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
035
036/**
037 * An simple list of HTTP parts (form-data, query-parameters, path-parameters).
038 *
039 * <h5 class='figure'>Example</h5>
040 * <p class='bjava'>
041 *    PartList <jv>parts</jv> = PartList
042 *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
043 *       .append(MyPart.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"foo"</js>))
044 *       .append(<js>"Bar"</js>, ()-&gt;<jsm>getDynamicValueFromSomewhere</jsm>());
045 * </p>
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
048 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauRestCommon">juneau-rest-common Basics</a>
049 * </ul>
050 */
051@SuppressWarnings({
052   "java:S110",  // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
053   "java:S115",  // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
054   "java:S2160"  // equals() inherited from AbstractList; list equality is element-based, which is correct for part lists
055})
056public class PartList extends ControlledArrayList<NameValuePair> {
057
058   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
059   private static final String ARG_type = "type";
060
061   /** Represents no part list in annotations. */
062   public static final class Void extends PartList {
063      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
064   }
065
066   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
067
068   /**
069    * Instantiates a new part list.
070    *
071    * @return A new part list.
072    */
073   public static PartList create() {
074      return new PartList();
075   }
076
077   /**
078    * Creates a new {@link PartList} initialized with the specified parts.
079    *
080    * @param parts
081    *    The parts to add to the list.
082    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
083    *    <br><jk>null</jk> entries are ignored.
084    * @return A new unmodifiable instance, never <jk>null</jk>.
085    */
086   public static PartList of(List<NameValuePair> parts) {
087      return new PartList().append(parts);
088   }
089
090   /**
091    * Creates a new {@link PartList} initialized with the specified parts.
092    *
093    * @param parts
094    *    The parts to add to the list.
095    *    <br><jk>null</jk> entries are ignored.
096    * @return A new unmodifiable instance, never <jk>null</jk>.
097    */
098   public static PartList of(NameValuePair...parts) {
099      return new PartList().append(parts);
100   }
101
102   /**
103    * Creates a new {@link PartList} initialized with the specified name/value pairs.
104    *
105    * <h5 class='figure'>Example</h5>
106    * <p class='bjava'>
107    *    PartList <jv>parts</jv> = PartList.<jsm>ofPairs</jsm>(<js>"foo"</js>, 1, <js>"bar"</js>, <jk>true</jk>);
108    * </p>
109    *
110    * @param pairs
111    *    Initial list of pairs.
112    *    <br>Must be an even number of parameters representing key/value pairs.
113    * @throws RuntimeException If odd number of parameters were specified.
114    * @return A new instance.
115    */
116   public static PartList ofPairs(String...pairs) {
117      var x = new PartList();
118      if (pairs == null)
119         pairs = new String[0];
120      assertArg(pairs.length % 2 == 0, "Odd number of parameters passed into PartList.ofPairs()");
121      for (var i = 0; i < pairs.length; i += 2)
122         x.add(BasicPart.of(pairs[i], pairs[i + 1]));
123      return x;
124   }
125
126   private transient VarResolver varResolver;
127   boolean caseInsensitive;
128
129   /**
130    * Constructor.
131    */
132   public PartList() {
133      super(false);
134   }
135
136   /**
137    * Copy constructor.
138    *
139    * @param copyFrom The bean to copy.
140    */
141   protected PartList(PartList copyFrom) {
142      super(false, copyFrom);
143      caseInsensitive = copyFrom.caseInsensitive;
144   }
145
146   /**
147    * Adds the specified parts to the end of the parts in this list.
148    *
149    * @param values The parts to add.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
150    * @return This object.
151    */
152   public PartList append(List<NameValuePair> values) {
153      if (nn(values))
154         values.forEach(this::append);
155      return this;
156   }
157
158   /**
159    * Adds the specified part to the end of the parts in this list.
160    *
161    * @param value The part to add.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
162    * @return This object.
163    */
164   public PartList append(NameValuePair value) {
165      if (nn(value))
166         add(value);
167      return this;
168   }
169
170   /**
171    * Adds the specified parts to the end of the parts in this list.
172    *
173    * @param values The parts to add.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
174    * @return This object.
175    */
176   public PartList append(NameValuePair...values) {
177      if (nn(values))
178         for (var value : values)
179            append(value);
180      return this;
181   }
182
183   /**
184    * Appends the specified part to the end of this list.
185    *
186    * <p>
187    * The part is added as a {@link BasicPart}.
188    *
189    * @param name The part name.
190    * @param value The part value.
191    * @return This object.
192    */
193   public PartList append(String name, Object value) {
194      return append(createPart(name, value));
195   }
196
197   /**
198    * Appends the specified part to the end of this list using a value supplier.
199    *
200    * <p>
201    * The part is added as a {@link BasicPart}.
202    *
203    * <p>
204    * Value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link BasicPart#getValue()}.
205    *
206    * @param name The part name.
207    * @param value The part value supplier.
208    * @return This object.
209    */
210   public PartList append(String name, Supplier<?> value) {
211      return append(createPart(name, value));
212   }
213
214   /**
215    * Specifies that the parts in this list should be treated as case-sensitive.
216    *
217    * <p>
218    * The default behavior is case-sensitive.
219    *
220    * @param value The new value for this setting.
221    * @return This object.
222    */
223   public PartList caseInsensitive(boolean value) {
224      assertModifiable();
225      caseInsensitive = value;
226      return this;
227   }
228
229   /**
230    * Tests if parts with the given name are contained within this list.
231    *
232    * <p>
233    * Part name comparison is case insensitive.
234    *
235    * @param name The part name.
236    * @return <jk>true</jk> if at least one part with the name is present.
237    */
238   public boolean contains(String name) {
239      return stream().anyMatch(x -> eq(x.getName(), name));
240   }
241
242   /**
243    * Makes a copy of this list.
244    *
245    * @return A new copy of this list.
246    */
247   public PartList copy() {
248      return new PartList(this);
249   }
250
251   /**
252    * Performs an action on all the matching parts in this list.
253    *
254    * <p>
255    * This is the preferred method for iterating over parts as it does not involve
256    * creation or copy of lists/arrays.
257    *
258    * @param filter A predicate to apply to each element to determine if it should be included.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
259    * @param action An action to perform on each element.
260    * @return This object.
261    */
262   public PartList forEach(Predicate<NameValuePair> filter, Consumer<NameValuePair> action) {
263      forEach(x -> consumeIf(filter, action, x));
264      return this;
265   }
266
267   /**
268    * Performs an action on all parts in this list with the specified name.
269    *
270    * <p>
271    * This is the preferred method for iterating over parts as it does not involve
272    * creation or copy of lists/arrays.
273    *
274    * @param name The parts name.
275    * @param action An action to perform on each element.
276    * @return This object.
277    */
278   public PartList forEach(String name, Consumer<NameValuePair> action) {
279      return forEach(x -> eq(name, x.getName()), action);
280   }
281
282   /**
283    * Performs an action on the values for all matching parts in this list.
284    *
285    * @param filter A predicate to apply to each element to determine if it should be included.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
286    * @param action An action to perform on each element.
287    * @return This object.
288    */
289   public PartList forEachValue(Predicate<NameValuePair> filter, Consumer<String> action) {
290      return forEach(filter, x -> action.accept(x.getValue()));
291   }
292
293   /**
294    * Performs an action on the values of all matching parts in this list.
295    *
296    * @param name The part name.
297    * @param action An action to perform on each element.
298    * @return This object.
299    */
300   public PartList forEachValue(String name, Consumer<String> action) {
301      return forEach(name, x -> action.accept(x.getValue()));
302   }
303
304   /**
305    * Gets a part representing all of the part values with the given name.
306    *
307    * <p>
308    * Same as {@link #get(String, Class)} but the part name is pulled from the name or value attribute of the {@link FormData}/{@link Query}/{@link Path} annotation.
309    *
310    * <h5 class='figure'>Example</h5>
311    * <p class='bjava'>
312    *    Age <jv>age</jv> = <jv>partList</jv>.get(Age.<jk>class</jk>);
313    * </p>
314    *
315    * @param <T> The part implementation class.
316    * @param type The part implementation class.
317    * @return A part with a condensed value or <jk>null</jk> if no parts by the given name are present
318    */
319   public <T> Optional<T> get(Class<T> type) {
320      assertArgNotNull(ARG_type, type);
321
322      var name = PartBeanMeta.of(type).getSchema().getName();
323      assertArg(nn(name), "Part name could not be found on bean type ''{0}''", cn(type));
324
325      return get(name, type);
326   }
327
328   /**
329    * Gets a part representing all of the part values with the given name.
330    *
331    * <p>
332    * If more that one part with the given name exists the values will be combined with <js>", "</js> as per
333    * <a href='https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2616#section-4.2'>RFC 2616 Section 4.2</a>.
334    *
335    * @param name The part name.
336    * @return A part with a condensed value, or {@link Optional#empty()} if no parts by the given name are present
337    */
338   public Optional<NameValuePair> get(String name) {
339
340      NameValuePair first = null;
341      List<NameValuePair> rest = null;
342      for (var x : this) {
343         if (eq(x.getName(), name)) {
344            if (first == null)
345               first = x;
346            else {
347               if (rest == null)
348                  rest = list();
349               rest.add(x);
350            }
351         }
352      }
353
354      if (first == null)
355         return oe();
356
357      if (rest == null)
358         return o(first);
359
360      var sb = new CharArrayBuffer(128);
361      sb.append(first.getValue());
362      for (var element : rest) {
363         sb.append(',');
364         sb.append(element.getValue());
365      }
366
367      return o(new BasicStringPart(name, sb.toString()));
368   }
369
370   /**
371    * Gets a part representing all of the part values with the given name.
372    *
373    * <p>
374    * If more that one part with the given name exists the values will be combined with <js>", "</js> as per
375    * <a href='https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2616#section-4.2'>RFC 2616 Section 4.2</a>.
376    *
377    * <p>
378    * The implementation class must have a public constructor taking in one of the following argument lists:
379    * <ul>
380    *    <li><c>X(String <jv>value</jv>)</c>
381    *    <li><c>X(Object <jv>value</jv>)</c>
382    *    <li><c>X(String <jv>name</jv>, String <jv>value</jv>)</c>
383    *    <li><c>X(String <jv>name</jv>, Object <jv>value</jv>)</c>
384    * </ul>
385    *
386    * <h5 class='figure'>Example</h5>
387    * <p class='bjava'>
388    *    BasicIntegerPart <jv>age</jv> = <jv>partList</jv>.get(<js>"age"</js>, BasicIntegerPart.<jk>class</jk>);
389    * </p>
390    *
391    * @param <T> The part implementation class.
392    * @param name The part name.
393    * @param type The part implementation class.
394    * @return A part with a condensed value or <jk>null</jk> if no parts by the given name are present
395    */
396   public <T> Optional<T> get(String name, Class<T> type) {
397
398      NameValuePair first = null;
399      List<NameValuePair> rest = null;
400      for (var x : this) {
401         if (eq(x.getName(), name)) {
402            if (first == null)
403               first = x;
404            else {
405               if (rest == null)
406                  rest = list();
407               rest.add(x);
408            }
409         }
410      }
411
412      if (first == null)
413         return oe();
414
415      if (rest == null)
416         return o(PartBeanMeta.of(type).construct(name, first.getValue()));
417
418      var sb = new CharArrayBuffer(128);
419      sb.append(first.getValue());
420      for (var element : rest) {
421         sb.append(',');
422         sb.append(element.getValue());
423      }
424
425      return o(PartBeanMeta.of(type).construct(name, sb.toString()));
426   }
427
428   /**
429    * Gets all of the parts.
430    *
431    * <p>
432    * The returned array maintains the relative order in which the parts were added.
433    * Each call creates a new array not backed by this list.
434    *
435    * <p>
436    * As a general rule, it's more efficient to use the other methods with consumers to
437    * get parts.
438    *
439    * @return An array containing all parts, never <jk>null</jk>.
440    */
441   public NameValuePair[] getAll() { return stream().toArray(NameValuePair[]::new); }
442
443   /**
444    * Gets all of the parts with the given name.
445    *
446    * <p>
447    * The returned array maintains the relative order in which the parts were added.
448    * Part name comparison is case sensitive by default.
449    * Parts with null values are ignored.
450    * Each call creates a new array not backed by this list.
451    *
452    * <p>
453    * As a general rule, it's more efficient to use the other methods with consumers to
454    * get parts.
455    *
456    * @param name The part name.
457    *
458    * @return An array containing all matching parts, never <jk>null</jk>.
459    */
460   public NameValuePair[] getAll(String name) {
461      return stream().filter(x -> eq(x.getName(), name)).toArray(NameValuePair[]::new);
462   }
463
464   /**
465    * Gets the first part with the given name.
466    *
467    * <p>
468    * Part name comparison is case sensitive by default.
469    *
470    * @param name The part name.
471    * @return The first matching part, or {@link Optional#empty()} if not found.
472    */
473   public Optional<NameValuePair> getFirst(String name) {
474      for (var i = 0; i < size(); i++) {
475         var x = get(i);
476         if (eq(x.getName(), name))
477            return o(x);
478      }
479      return oe();
480   }
481
482   /**
483    * Gets the last part with the given name.
484    *
485    * <p>
486    * Part name comparison is case sensitive by default.
487    *
488    * @param name The part name.
489    * @return The last matching part, or {@link Optional#empty()} if not found.
490    */
491   public Optional<NameValuePair> getLast(String name) {
492      for (var i = size() - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
493         var x = get(i);
494         if (eq(x.getName(), name))
495            return o(x);
496      }
497      return oe();
498   }
499
500   /**
501    * Returns all the string values for all parts with the specified name.
502    *
503    * @param name The part name.
504    * @return An array containing all values.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
505    */
506   public String[] getValues(String name) {
507      return stream().filter(x -> eq(x.getName(), name)).map(NameValuePair::getValue).toArray(String[]::new);
508   }
509
510   /**
511    * Returns an iterator over this list of parts.
512    *
513    * @return A new iterator over this list of parts.
514    */
515   public PartIterator partIterator() {
516      return new BasicPartIterator(toArray(new NameValuePair[0]), null, caseInsensitive);
517   }
518
519   /**
520    * Returns an iterator over the parts with a given name in this list.
521    *
522    * @param name The name of the parts over which to iterate, or <jk>null</jk> for all parts
523    *
524    * @return A new iterator over the matching parts in this list.
525    */
526   public PartIterator partIterator(String name) {
527      return new BasicPartIterator(getAll(name), name, caseInsensitive);
528   }
529
530   /**
531    * Adds the specified parts to the beginning of the parts in this list.
532    *
533    * @param values The parts to add.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
534    * @return This object.
535    */
536   public PartList prepend(List<NameValuePair> values) {
537      if (nn(values))
538         addAll(0, values);
539      return this;
540   }
541
542   /**
543    * Adds the specified part to the beginning of the parts in this list.
544    *
545    * @param value The part to add.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
546    * @return This object.
547    */
548   public PartList prepend(NameValuePair value) {
549      if (nn(value))
550         add(0, value);
551      return this;
552   }
553
554   /**
555    * Adds the specified parts to the beginning of the parts in this list.
556    *
557    * @param values The parts to add.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
558    * @return This object.
559    */
560   public PartList prepend(NameValuePair...values) {
561      if (nn(values))
562         prepend(l(values));
563      return this;
564   }
565
566   /**
567    * Appends the specified part to the beginning of this list.
568    *
569    * <p>
570    * The part is added as a {@link BasicPart}.
571    *
572    * @param name The part name.
573    * @param value The part value.
574    * @return This object.
575    */
576   public PartList prepend(String name, Object value) {
577      return prepend(createPart(name, value));
578   }
579
580   /**
581    * Appends the specified part to the beginning of this list using a value supplier.
582    *
583    * <p>
584    * The part is added as a {@link BasicPart}.
585    *
586    * <p>
587    * Value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link BasicPart#getValue()}.
588    *
589    * @param name The part name.
590    * @param value The part value supplier.
591    * @return This object.
592    */
593   public PartList prepend(String name, Supplier<?> value) {
594      return prepend(createPart(name, value));
595   }
596
597   /**
598    * Removes the specified parts from this list.
599    *
600    * @param values The parts to remove.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
601    * @return This object.
602    */
603   public PartList remove(List<NameValuePair> values) {
604      if (nn(values))
605         values.forEach(this::remove);
606      return this;
607   }
608
609   /**
610    * Removes the specified part from this list.
611    *
612    * @param value The part to remove.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
613    * @return This object.
614    */
615   public PartList remove(NameValuePair value) {
616      if (nn(value))
617         removeIf(x -> eq(x.getName(), value.getName()) && eq(x.getValue(), value.getValue()));
618      return this;
619   }
620
621   /**
622    * Removes the specified parts from this list.
623    *
624    * @param values The parts to remove.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
625    * @return This object.
626    */
627   public PartList remove(NameValuePair...values) {
628      for (var value : values)
629         remove(value);
630      return this;
631   }
632
633   /**
634    * Removes the part with the specified name from this list.
635    *
636    * @param name The part name.
637    * @return This object.
638    */
639   public PartList remove(String name) {
640      removeIf(x -> eq(x.getName(), name));
641      return this;
642   }
643
644   /**
645    * Removes the part with the specified name from this list.
646    *
647    * @param names The part name.
648    * @return This object.
649    */
650   public PartList remove(String...names) {
651      if (nn(names))
652         for (var name : names)
653            remove(name);
654      return this;
655   }
656
657   /**
658    * Allows part values to contain SVL variables.
659    *
660    * <p>
661    * Resolves variables in part values when using the following methods:
662    * <ul>
663    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #append(String, Object) append(String,Object)}
664    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #append(String, Supplier) append(String,Supplier&lt;?&gt;)}
665    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #prepend(String, Object) prepend(String,Object)}
666    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #prepend(String, Supplier) prepend(String,Supplier&lt;?&gt;)}
667    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #set(String, Object) set(String,Object)}
668    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #set(String, Supplier) set(String,Supplier&lt;?&gt;)}
669    * </ul>
670    *
671    * <p>
672    * Uses {@link VarResolver#DEFAULT} to resolve variables.
673    *
674    * @return This object.
675    */
676   public PartList resolving() {
677      return resolving(VarResolver.DEFAULT);
678   }
679
680   /**
681    * Allows part values to contain SVL variables.
682    *
683    * <p>
684    * Resolves variables in part values when using the following methods:
685    * <ul>
686    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #append(String, Object) append(String,Object)}
687    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #append(String, Supplier) append(String,Supplier&lt;?&gt;)}
688    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #prepend(String, Object) prepend(String,Object)}
689    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #prepend(String, Supplier) prepend(String,Supplier&lt;?&gt;)}
690    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #set(String, Object) set(String,Object)}
691    *    <li class='jm'>{@link #set(String, Supplier) set(String,Supplier&lt;?&gt;)}
692    * </ul>
693    *
694    * @param varResolver The variable resolver to use for resolving variables.
695    * @return This object.
696    */
697   public PartList resolving(VarResolver varResolver) {
698      assertModifiable();
699      this.varResolver = varResolver;
700      return this;
701   }
702
703   /**
704    * Replaces the first occurrence of the parts with the same name.
705    *
706    * <p>
707    * If no part with the same name is found the given part is added to the end of the list.
708    *
709    * @param values The parts to replace.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
710    * @return This object.
711    */
712   @SuppressWarnings({
713      "java:S127", // S127: loop counter j2 decrements when removing
714      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
715   })
716   public PartList set(List<NameValuePair> values) {
717
718      if (nn(values)) {
719         for (var h : values) {
720            if (nn(h)) {
721               for (int i2 = 0, j2 = size(); i2 < j2; i2++) {
722                  var x = get(i2);
723                  if (eq(x.getName(), h.getName())) {
724                     remove(i2);
725                     j2--;
726                  }
727               }
728            }
729         }
730
731         for (var x : values) {
732            if (nn(x)) {
733               add(x);
734            }
735         }
736      }
737
738      return this;
739   }
740
741   /**
742    * Adds or replaces the part(s) with the same name.
743    *
744    * <p>
745    * If no part with the same name is found the given part is added to the end of the list.
746    *
747    * @param value The part to replace.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
748    * @return This object.
749    */
750   @SuppressWarnings({
751      "java:S127" // Loop counter j decrements when removing elements
752   })
753   public PartList set(NameValuePair value) {
754      if (nn(value)) {
755         var replaced = false;
756         for (int i = 0, j = size(); i < j; i++) {
757            var x = get(i);
758            if (eq(x.getName(), value.getName())) {
759               if (replaced) {
760                  remove(i);
761                  j--;
762               } else {
763                  set(i, value);
764                  replaced = true;
765               }
766            }
767         }
768
769         if (! replaced)
770            add(value);
771      }
772
773      return this;
774   }
775
776   /**
777    * Adds or replaces the part(s) with the same name.
778    *
779    * <p>
780    * If no part with the same name is found the given part is added to the end of the list.
781    *
782    * @param values The part to replace.  <jk>null</jk> values are ignored.
783    * @return This object.
784    */
785   public PartList set(NameValuePair...values) {
786      if (nn(values))
787         set(l(values));
788      return this;
789   }
790
791   /**
792    * Replaces the first occurrence of the parts with the same name.
793    *
794    * @param name The part name.
795    * @param value The part value.
796    * @return This object.
797    */
798   public PartList set(String name, Object value) {
799      return set(createPart(name, value));
800   }
801
802   /**
803    * Replaces the first occurrence of the parts with the same name.
804    *
805    * @param name The part name.
806    * @param value The part value.
807    * @return This object.
808    */
809   public PartList set(String name, Supplier<?> value) {
810      return set(createPart(name, value));
811   }
812
813   /**
814    * Adds a collection of default parts.
815    *
816    * <p>
817    * Default parts are set if they're not already in the list.
818    *
819    * @param parts The list of default parts.
820    * @return This object.
821    */
822   public PartList setDefault(List<NameValuePair> parts) {
823      if (nn(parts))
824         parts.stream().filter(x -> nn(x) && ! contains(x.getName())).forEach(this::set);
825      return this;
826   }
827
828   /**
829    * Makes a copy of this list of parts and adds a collection of default parts.
830    *
831    * <p>
832    * Default parts are set if they're not already in the list.
833    *
834    * @param parts The list of default parts.
835    * @return A new list, or the same list if the parts were empty.
836    */
837   public PartList setDefault(NameValuePair...parts) {
838      if (nn(parts))
839         setDefault(l(parts));
840      return this;
841   }
842
843   /**
844    * Replaces the first occurrence of the part with the same name.
845    *
846    * @param name The header name.
847    * @param value The header value.
848    * @return This object.
849    */
850   public PartList setDefault(String name, Object value) {
851      return setDefault(createPart(name, value));
852   }
853
854   /**
855    * Replaces the first occurrence of the headers with the same name.
856    *
857    * @param name The header name.
858    * @param value The header value.
859    * @return This object.
860    */
861   public PartList setDefault(String name, Supplier<?> value) {
862      return setDefault(createPart(name, value));
863   }
864
865   @Override /* Overridden from ControlledArrayList */
866   public PartList setUnmodifiable() {
867      super.setUnmodifiable();
868      return this;
869   }
870
871   /**
872    * Returns a stream of the parts in this list with the specified name.
873    *
874    * <p>
875    * This does not involve a copy of the underlying array of <c>NameValuePair</c> objects so should perform well.
876    *
877    * @param name The part name.
878    * @return This object.
879    */
880   public Stream<NameValuePair> stream(String name) {
881      return stream().filter(x -> eq(name, x.getName()));
882   }
883
884   /**
885    * Returns this list as a URL-encoded custom query.
886    */
887   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
888   public String toString() {
889      var sb = new StringBuilder();
890      forEach(p -> {
891         if (nn(p)) {
892            var v = p.getValue();
893            if (nn(v)) {
894               if (!sb.isEmpty())
895                  sb.append("&");
896               sb.append(urlEncode(p.getName())).append('=').append(urlEncode(p.getValue()));
897            }
898         }
899      });
900      return sb.toString();
901   }
902
903   private NameValuePair createPart(String name, Object value) {
904      var isResolving = nn(varResolver);
905
906      if (value instanceof Supplier<?> value2) {
907         return isResolving ? new BasicPart(name, resolver(value2)) : new BasicPart(name, value2);
908      }
909      return isResolving ? new BasicPart(name, resolver(value)) : new BasicPart(name, value);
910   }
911
912   private boolean eq(String s1, String s2) {
913      return Shorts.eq(caseInsensitive, s1, s2);  // NOAI
914   }
915
916   private Supplier<Object> resolver(Object input) {
917      return () -> varResolver.resolve(s(unwrap(input)));
918   }
919
920   private static Object unwrap(Object o) {
921      while (o instanceof Supplier<?> s)
922         o = s.get();
923      return o;
924   }
925}
